name: Chewy Oatmeal Spice Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Apple butter or apple sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix ground cinnamon and salt (optional).
2. Add 1/4 teaspoon ground nutmeg (optional) to the dry ingredients.
3. Combine QUAKER Oats uncooked (quick or old-fashioned), raisins/diced dried mixed fruit, and the combined flour mixture in another bowl.
4. Stir everything together until well combined. The dough will be moist.
5. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto a prepared cookie sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes or until the edges are light golden brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for one minute before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Store in a tightly covered container.
Apple butter is typically found in your supermarket's jam & jelly section.
Convenient Bar Cookies: Spread dough evenly over an ungreased 9x13-inch baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until the edges are light golden brown. Allow cooling completely before cutting into bars. Store tightly covered.
